name: growmodo/faq
title: FAQ
description: Frequently Asked Questions card grid — reused verbatim on Home and Property Single, per the SOT.

body.default: Find answers to common questions about Estatein's services, property listings, and the real estate process. We're here to provide clarity and assist you every step of the way.

default.question: How do I search for properties on Estatein?
default.answer: Learn how to use our user-friendly search tools to find properties that match your criteria.

default.question: What documents do I need to sell my property through Estatein?
default.answer: Find out about the necessary documentation for listing your property with us.

default.question: How can I contact an Estatein agent?
default.answer: Discover the different ways you can get in touch with our experienced agents.
